artefacts.data_model_amendment: v5.2 (2026-06-08): added BusinessCalendar entity (§5.2.46) — Stage-3/ADR-6 follow-up, folded into initial schema pre-deployment, re-validated; Gate B remains satisfied (47 tables).

Blocker cleared by v5.1; independent audit 7P/3W/0F (role aliases + glossary WARNs).

caveats: Tracked open decisions (do not block Gate A; required before integration build): OD-08 select PAN/CKYC/DigiLocker/comms/CTI vendors; OD-17 complete TRAI-DLT + WhatsApp-WABA messaging registration.

Council pre-dispatch hardening follow-ups (Stage 3+/architecture+contracts, not Gate-A items): LeadService mutator interface, unit-of-work/transaction-propagation pattern, versioned LOS mock contract, BusinessCalendar entity, DPDPA-erasure-vs-immutable-audit design. See docs/evaluations/lms-brd-v5-council-report-2026-06-05.md.

B.live_validation: Loaded clean on PostgreSQL 18 (ON_ERROR_STOP exit 0); live in local lms_dev DB. 46 tables, 69 enums, 194 FKs.
caveats: Business confirmations (not blockers): #1 single-tenant MVP, #3 leads.product_code+product_config_id, #5 migration channel out of scope.
Legal/DPO required before customer self-service go-live: #6 consent-bootstrap lawful basis.
Stage 3 (architecture) follow-ups flagged by council: audit hash-chain single-writer serialization (#9); BusinessCalendar/WorkingHours source for SLA/TAT (#10).
See docs/data-model/DATA_MODEL.md Assumptions & Gaps (14 items) and docs/evaluations/lms-brd-v5-council-report-2026-06-05.md.

C.validation: api-contract.yaml parsed valid via npx js-yaml (Node v24, exit 0, 62 paths); auth-matrix.json valid JSON (9 roles, 47 resources, 14 public). FR coverage 49/49; status-enum coverage 22/22. A real YAML defect (flow-sequence braces in x-fr-coverage) was caught and fixed during the gate.
